scenarios.title: Unauthorized repair attempt
scenarios.description: Customer attempted to replace the iPhone's battery themselves, causing internal damage. The phone now fails to power on.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider ("AASP").

policy_references.section: Important: Do not open the Covered iPhone.
policy_references.snippet: Opening the Covered iPhone may cause damage that is not covered by this Plan. Only Apple or an authorized service provider should perform service on the Covered iPhone.

scenarios.reasoning: The customer opened the device and performed an unauthorized repair, which is specifically excluded from coverage under section 4.2(ii)(d). Any resulting damage from non-authorized service is not covered, and no service fee or ADH claim limit applies.
